[Search Console](https://goo.gle/searchconsole)

*   [Página inicial](https://developers.google.com/?hl=pt-br)
    
*   [Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=pt-br)
    
*   [Documentation](https://developers.google.com/search/docs?hl=pt-br)
    

Envie comentários

Mantenha tudo organizado com as coleções Salve e categorize o conteúdo com base nas suas preferências.

Pausar temporariamente ou desativar um site
===========================================

Caso não consiga atender aos pedidos, ou muitos dos seus produtos estejam em falta, talvez você esteja pensando em fechar temporariamente sua empresa on-line. Se a situação for temporária, e você acreditar que voltará a vender produtos nas próximas semanas ou meses, recomendamos que você tome providências adequadas para preservar ao máximo a posição do seu site na Pesquisa. Este guia explica como pausar seus negócios on-line com segurança.

Limitar a funcionalidade do seu site (recomendado)
--------------------------------------------------

Caso a situação seja temporária e você pretenda reabrir sua empresa on-line, recomendamos manter o site no ar e limitar os recursos dele. Essa é a abordagem recomendada porque minimiza os efeitos negativos sobre a presença do site na Pesquisa. As pessoas ainda poderão encontrar seus produtos, ler avaliações ou adicionar itens a listas de desejos para comprá-los mais tarde. Recomendamos que você faça o seguinte:

*   **Desative o recurso de carrinho:** essa é a abordagem mais simples e não afeta a visibilidade do site na Pesquisa.
*   **Mostre um banner ou pop-up:** um div de banner ou pop-up em todas as páginas, incluindo a página de destino, ajuda a esclarecer o status do site para os usuários. Mencione atrasos incomuns, tempo para envio e opções de retirada ou entrega, para que os usuários mantenham expectativas adequadas. Para impedir que o conteúdo do banner ou pop-up seja exibido em um snippet nos resultados da pesquisa, use o [atributo HTML `data-nosnippet`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/robots-meta-tag?hl=pt-br#data-nosnippet-attr)
     (em inglês). Siga nossas [diretrizes sobre pop-ups e banners](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/avoid-intrusive-interstitials?hl=pt-br)
    .
*   **Atualize os dados estruturados:** se o site usa dados estruturados, como [`Product`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/product?hl=pt-br)
    , [`Book`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/book?hl=pt-br)
     ou [`Event`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/event?hl=pt-br)
    , faça os ajustes necessários para que reflitam a disponibilidade atual do produto ou para definir os eventos como cancelados. Caso sua empresa tenha uma vitrine física, atualize os [dados estruturados de empresa local](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/local-business?hl=pt-br)
     para refletir o horário de funcionamento atual.
*   **Verifique seu feed do Google Merchant Center:** caso você use o Merchant Center, siga as [práticas recomendadas para o atributo de disponibilidade](https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/6324448?hl=pt-br)
    .
*   **Informe o Google sobre suas atualizações:** para solicitar que o Google rastreie novamente um número limitado de páginas (por exemplo, a página inicial), use o [Search Console](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/ask-google-to-recrawl?hl=pt-br)
    . Caso isso precise ser feito em um número maior de páginas (por exemplo, em todas as páginas de produtos), [use sitemaps](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/guides/submit-URLs?hl=pt-br)
    .

Não recomendado: desativar todo o site
--------------------------------------

Talvez você decida desativar o site todo. Essa é uma medida extrema que precisa ser tomada somente por um período muito curto (alguns dias, no máximo) ou **afetará significativamente o site** na Pesquisa, mesmo quando implementada corretamente.

Veja os efeitos colaterais da desativação do site todo:

*   Os clientes não saberão o que está acontecendo com sua empresa se não conseguirem encontrá-la on-line.
*   Os clientes não conseguirão encontrar ou ler informações sobre sua empresa em primeira mão; e os exemplos, avaliações, especificações, guias de reparo ou manuais não poderão ser encontrados. Talvez as informações de terceiros não sejam tão corretas ou abrangentes quanto as fornecidas por você. Isso também afeta decisões de compra futuras.
*   Os Painéis de Informações podem perder dados, como números de telefone para contato e o logotipo do seu site.
*   Ocorrerá uma falha na verificação do Search Console, e você perderá todo o acesso a informações sobre sua empresa na Pesquisa. Os relatórios agregados no Search Console perderão dados à medida que as páginas forem retiradas do índice.
*   O retorno após um período prolongado será muito mais difícil se o site precisar ser reindexado primeiro. Além disso, não é possível saber ao certo quanto tempo esse processo levaria e se o site apareceria da mesma forma na Pesquisa.

Se você decidir que precisa fazer isso (o que **não é recomendado**), veja algumas opções:

*   Se você precisar desativar o site com urgência por 1 ou 2 dias, retorne uma página de erro informativa com um [código de status de resposta HTTP `503`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/503)
     em vez de todo o conteúdo. Siga as [práticas recomendadas para desativar um site](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/pause-online-business?hl=pt-br#best-practices-disabling-site)
    .
*   Caso precise desativar o site por um longo período, disponibilize uma página inicial indexável como marcador para que ela possa ser encontrada pelos usuários na Pesquisa. Para isso, use o código de status HTTP `200`.
*   Se você precisar ocultar rapidamente seu site na Pesquisa enquanto estiver considerando as opções, [remova temporariamente o site da Pesquisa](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9689846?hl=pt-br)
    .

### Práticas recomendadas para desativar um site

Embora não seja recomendável desativar seu site, se você decidir fazer isso, veja algumas práticas recomendadas:

*   Continue permitindo o rastreamento pelo arquivo robots.txt. **Não retorne um código de status de resposta HTTP `503` para o arquivo robots.txt, porque isso bloqueia todo o rastreamento**.
*   Confirme um código de status de resposta HTTP `503` localmente usando o comando [curl](https://curl.haxx.se/docs/manpage.html)
     ou uma ferramenta semelhante. Exemplo:
    
    curl -I -X GET "https://www.example.com/"
    HTTP/1.1 503 Service Unavailable
    Mime-Version: 1.0
    Content-Type: text/html
    (...)
    
*   Para minimizar a carga do servidor e do cliente de uma página de erro `503`, siga estas práticas recomendadas:
    *   Use o [cabeçalho HTTP `retry-after`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Retry-After)
         com uma estimativa de data ou duração.
    *   Use HTML estático.
    *   Minimize os recursos fora da página. Use folhas de estilo CSS in-line e imagens codificadas em base-64.
*   Apresente aos usuários orientações claras sobre as etapas futuras no conteúdo da página de erro. Isso pode incluir:
    *   links para mais informações;
    *   a data em que você espera que o site fique on-line novamente ou quando as informações serão atualizadas;
    *   como entrar em contato com o atendimento ao cliente;
*   Não proíba todos os rastreamentos no arquivo robots.txt. Se um arquivo robots.txt válido que proíbe todos os rastreamentos for retornado, o conteúdo do site e possivelmente os URLs dele talvez sejam removidos da Pesquisa Google.
*   Não bloqueie o site retornando os códigos de status HTTP `403`, `404` ou `410`, com uma tag `noindex` robots `meta` ou com um cabeçalho HTTP x-robots-tag. Isso vai remover os URLs do site da Pesquisa Google.
*   Não use a Ferramenta de remoção temporária de sites do Search Console para fazer fechamentos. Se isso for feito, os usuários não poderão encontrar o site para saber o status dele. Além disso, possíveis revendedores ou afiliados dos produtos da sua empresa talvez continuem a aparecer na Pesquisa.
*   Não bloqueie seu arquivo robots.txt com um código de status de resposta HTTP `503`.

Perguntas frequentes
--------------------

### E se eu fechar o site somente por algumas semanas?

O fechamento total de um site, mesmo que apenas por algumas semanas, pode ter consequências negativas na indexação dele pelo Google. Em vez disso, recomendamos [limitar a funcionalidade do site](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/pause-online-business?hl=pt-br#limit-site)
. Isso é importante porque os usuários também podem querer encontrar informações sobre seus produtos, serviços e empresa mesmo que você não esteja vendendo nada no momento.

### E se eu quiser excluir todos os produtos não essenciais?

Tudo bem. [Limite a funcionalidade do site](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/pause-online-business?hl=pt-br#limit-site)
 para que as pessoas não possam comprar esses produtos.

### Posso solicitar que o Google rastreie menos enquanto meu site está temporariamente fechado?

Sim, você pode [reduzir a taxa de rastreamento do Googlebot](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/guides/reduce-crawl-rate?hl=pt-br)
, embora isso não seja recomendado na maioria dos casos. Isso pode afetar a atualização dos seus resultados na Pesquisa Google. Por exemplo, talvez leve mais tempo para que a Pesquisa mostre que todos os produtos estão indisponíveis no momento. No entanto, se o rastreamento do Googlebot causar problemas críticos nos recursos do servidor, essa será uma abordagem válida. É recomendável criar um lembrete para redefinir a taxa de rastreamento quando você estiver com tudo pronto para voltar aos negócios.

### Como fazer com que uma página seja indexada ou atualizada rapidamente?

Para solicitar que o Google rastreie novamente um número limitado de páginas (por exemplo, a página inicial), use o [Search Console](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/ask-google-to-recrawl?hl=pt-br)
. Caso isso precise ser feito em um número maior de páginas (por exemplo, em todas as páginas de produtos), [use sitemaps](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/guides/submit-URLs?hl=pt-br)
.

### E se eu bloquear o acesso ao meu site de uma região específica?

O Google geralmente faz o rastreamento nos EUA. Se você bloquear os EUA, a Pesquisa Google não poderá acessar o site. Não é recomendável bloquear temporariamente o acesso a uma região inteira. Em vez disso, recomendamos [limitar a funcionalidade do site](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/pause-online-business?hl=pt-br#limit-site)
 para essa região.

### Posso usar a [Ferramenta de remoção](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9689846?hl=pt-br)
 para remover produtos esgotados?

Não. Se você fizer isso, os clientes não conseguirão encontrar informações em primeira mão sobre seus produtos na Pesquisa, e talvez haja informações incorretas ou incompletas de terceiros sobre eles. A melhor opção é continuar permitindo essa página e marcar os produtos como esgotados. Dessa forma, as pessoas entenderão o que está acontecendo, mesmo que não consigam comprar o item. Se você remover o produto da Pesquisa, as pessoas não saberão o motivo da remoção.

Envie comentários

Exceto em caso de indicação contrária, o conteúdo desta página é licenciado de acordo com a [Licença de atribuição 4.0 do Creative Commons](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
, e as amostras de código são licenciadas de acordo com a [Licença Apache 2.0](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
. Para mais detalhes, consulte as [políticas do site do Google Developers](https://developers.google.com/site-policies?hl=pt-br)
. Java é uma marca registrada da Oracle e/ou afiliadas.

Última atualização 2025-08-04 UTC.

# ترميز المحتوى الذي يتطلب اشتراكًا والمحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع | مجموعة خدمات بحث Google  |  Documentation  |  Google for Developers

[التخطّي إلى المحتوى الرئيسي](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/paywalled-content?hl=ar#main-content)

[![Google Search Central](https://developers.google.com/static/search/images/google-search-central-logo.svg)](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=ar)

*   [Google Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=ar)
    

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español

تسجيل الدخول

*   [Documentation](https://developers.google.com/search/docs?hl=ar)
    

[Search Console](https://goo.gle/searchconsole)

*   [الصفحة الرئيسية](https://developers.google.com/?hl=ar)
    
*   [Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=ar)
    
*   [Documentation](https://developers.google.com/search/docs?hl=ar)
    

إرسال ملاحظات

تنظيم صفحاتك في مجموعات يمكنك حفظ المحتوى وتصنيفه حسب إعداداتك المفضّلة.

البيانات المنظَّمة بشأن الاشتراك والمحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع (`CreativeWork`)
================================================================================================

تتضمّن هذه الصفحة شرحًا حول كيفية استخدام الترميز JSON-LD من schema.org للإشارة إلى توفُّر محتوى محمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع على موقعك الإلكتروني، وذلك باستخدام سمات [`CreativeWork`](https://schema.org/CreativeWork)
. تساعد هذه البيانات المنظَّمة محرّك بحث Google على التفريق بين المحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع وممارسات [إخفاء الهوية](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/essentials/spam-policies?hl=ar#cloaking)
 التي تنتهك [السياسات المتعلقة بالمحتوى غير المرغوب فيه](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/essentials/spam-policies?hl=ar)
. يمكنك الاطّلاع على مزيد من المعلومات حول [الاشتراك والمحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/flexible-sampling?hl=ar)
.

مثال
----

في ما يلي مثال على بيانات `[NewsArticle](https://schema.org/NewsArticle) ` المنظَّمة باستخدام المحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع.

<html> <head> <title>Article headline</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "NewsArticle", "headline": "Article headline", "image": "https://example.org/thumbnail1.jpg", "datePublished": "2025-02-05T08:00:00+08:00", "dateModified": "2025-02-05T09:20:00+08:00", "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "John Doe", "url": "https://example.com/profile/johndoe123" }, "description": "A most wonderful article", "isAccessibleForFree": false, "hasPart": { "@type": "WebPageElement", "isAccessibleForFree": false, "cssSelector" : ".paywall" } } </script> </head> <body> <div class="non-paywall"> Non-Paywalled Content </div> <div class="paywall"> Paywalled Content </div> </body> </html>

<html>
  <head>
    <title>Article headline</title>
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "NewsArticle",
      "headline": "Article headline",
      "image": "https://example.org/thumbnail1.jpg",
      "datePublished": "2025-02-05T08:00:00+08:00",
      "dateModified": "2025-02-05T09:20:00+08:00",
      "author": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "John Doe",
        "url": "https://example.com/profile/johndoe123"
      },
      "description": "A most wonderful article",
      "isAccessibleForFree": false,
      "hasPart":
        {
        "@type": "WebPageElement",
        "isAccessibleForFree": false,
        "cssSelector" : ".paywall"
        }
    }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="non-paywall">
      Non-Paywalled Content
    </div>
    <div class="paywall">
      Paywalled Content
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

الإرشادات
---------

يجب اتّباع [الإرشادات العامة للبيانات المنظَّمة](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/sd-policies?hl=ar)
 و[الإرشادات الفنية](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/sd-policies?hl=ar#technical-guidelines)
 لتكون صفحتك مؤهلة للظهور ضمن نتائج البحث. إضافةً إلى ذلك، تسري الإرشادات التالية على المحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع:

*   تُعدّ تنسيقات الترميز JSON-LD وترميز البيانات الجزئية طرقًا مقبولة لتحديد البيانات المنظَّمة الخاصة بالمحتوى المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع.
*   لا تدمج أقسام المحتوى.
*   لا تستخدِم سوى أدوات اختيار `.class` للسمة `cssSelector`.
*   إذا أردت حجب المحتوى عن المتصفّح عند العرض، اختَر حاجز دفع لا يتم من خلاله عرض المحتوى المدفوع للمتصفّح. وإذا كنت تستخدم حلاً يعتمد على JavaScript من جهة العميل، اطّلِع على [إرشاداتنا حول كيفية إعداد المحتوى المدفوع](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/javascript/fix-search-javascript?hl=ar#paywall)
    .

إضافة ترميز إلى المحتوى المدفوع
-------------------------------

إذا كان [الاشتراك شرطًا للوصول إلى محتوى موقعك الإلكتروني](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/flexible-sampling?hl=ar)
، أو إذا كان على المستخدمين التسجيل للوصول إلى أي محتوى تريد فهرسته، اتّبِع الخطوات الواردة أدناه. ينطبق المثال التالي على بيانات `NewsArticle` المنظَّمة. احرص على اتّباع هذه الخطوات في جميع إصدارات صفحتك (بما في ذلك صفحات AMP والصفحات الأخرى).

1.  أضِف اسم فئة حول كل قسم من الأقسام المحمية بجدار دفع في صفحتك. مثلاً:
    
    <body\>
    <p>This content is outside a paywall and is visible to all.</p\>
    <div class\="paywall"\>This content is inside a paywall, and requires a subscription or registration.</div\>
    </body\>
    
2.  أضِف بيانات [`NewsArticle`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/article?hl=ar)
     المنظَّمة.
3.  أضِف بيانات JSON-LD المنظَّمة التي تم تمييزها إلى بيانات `NewsArticle` المنظَّمة الخاصة بك.
    
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "NewsArticle",
      "mainEntityOfPage": {
        "@type": "WebPage",
        "@id": "https://example.org/article"
      },
      (...)
      **"isAccessibleForFree": false,
      "hasPart": {
        "@type": "WebPageElement",
        "isAccessibleForFree": false,
        "cssSelector": ".paywall"
      }
    }**
    
4.  تحقَّق من صحة الرمز باستخدام [اختبار النتائج الغنية بصريًا](https://search.google.com/test/rich-results?hl=ar)
    ، وأصلِح أي أخطاء ملحّة.

### أقسام متعددة محمية بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع

في حال كانت لديك عدة أقسام محمية بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع في إحدى الصفحات، اختَر إضافة أسماء الفئة في شكل مصفوفة.

وفي ما يلي مثال على الأقسام المحمية بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع على إحدى الصفحات.

<body\>
  <div class\="section1"\>This content is inside a paywall, and requires a subscription or registration.</div\>
  <p>This content is outside a paywall and is visible to all.</p\>
  <div class\="section2"\>This is another section that's inside a paywall, or requires a subscription or registration.</div\>
</body\>

في ما يلي مثال على بيانات [`NewsArticle`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/article?hl=ar)
 المنظَّمة مع عدّة أقسام محمية بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "NewsArticle",
  "mainEntityOfPage": {
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "@id": "https://example.org/article"
    },
  (...)
  **"isAccessibleForFree": false,
  "hasPart": \[\
    {\
      "@type": "WebPageElement",\
      "isAccessibleForFree": false,\
      "cssSelector": ".section1"\
    }, {\
      "@type": "WebPageElement",\
      "isAccessibleForFree": false,\
      "cssSelector": ".section2"\
    }\
  \]
}**

### الأنواع المتوافقة

هذا الترميز متوافق مع النوع `[CreativeWork](https://schema.org/CreativeWork) ` أو أحد أنواع `CreativeWork` التالية الأكثر تحديدًا:

*   `[Article](https://schema.org/Article) `
*   `[NewsArticle](https://schema.org/NewsArticle) `
*   `[Blog](https://schema.org/Blog) `
*   `[Comment](https://schema.org/Comment) `
*   `[Course](https://schema.org/Course) `
*   `[HowTo](https://schema.org/HowTo) `
*   `[Message](https://schema.org/Message) `
*   `[Review](https://schema.org/Review) `
*   `[WebPage](https://schema.org/WebPage) `

يمكن استخدام أنواع schema.org متعددة، مثل الأنواع التالية:

`"@type": ["Article", "LearningResource"]`

يجب تضمين السمات المطلوبة لكي يكتشف محرّك بحث Google أنّ المقالة تتضمّن محتوًى محميًا بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع. ويمكنك إضافة السمات التي يُنصح بها إذا أردت تضمين تفاصيل حول الأقسام المحمية بجدار دفع ضمن الصفحة (أو الأقسام التي تتطلّب التسجيل أو الاشتراك).

| السمات المطلوبة |     |
| --- | --- |
| `isAccessibleForFree` | `[Boolean](https://schema.org/Boolean) `<br><br>تحدّد هذه السمة ما إذا كانت المقالة متاحة للجميع أو محمية بجدار دفع (أو تتطلّب التسجيل أو الاشتراك). اضبط السمة `isAccessibleForFree` على `false` للإشارة إلى أنّ هذا القسم محمي بجدار دفع. |

| السمات المقترَحة |     |
| --- | --- |
| `hasPart.cssSelector` | `[CssSelectorType](https://schema.org/CssSelectorType) `<br><br>هذه السمة هي أداة اختيار لغة CSS وتشير إلى اسم الفئة الذي [ضبطته في HTML](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/paywalled-content?hl=ar#class-name-step)<br> لتحديد القسم المحمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع. |
| `hasPart.@type` | `[Text](https://schema.org/Text) `<br><br>يجب ضبط قيمة `@type` على `WebPageElement`. |
| `hasPart.isAccessibleForFree` | `[Boolean](https://schema.org/Boolean) `<br><br>تحدّد هذه السمة ما إذا كان هذا القسم من المقالة محميًا بجدار دفع (أو يتطلّب التسجيل أو الاشتراك). اضبط السمة `isAccessibleForFree` على `False` للإشارة إلى أنّ هذا القسم محمي بجدار دفع. |

الاعتبارات المتعلّقة بصفحات AMP
-------------------------------

في ما يلي قائمة بالاعتبارات التي يجب مراعاتها عند استخدام صفحات AMP:

*   إذا كانت لديك صفحة AMP تشتمل على محتوى محمي بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع، استخدِم [`amp-subscriptions`](https://www.ampproject.org/docs/reference/components/amp-subscriptions)
     عندما يكون ذلك مناسبًا.
*   تأكَّد من أنّ نقطة نهاية التفويض تمنح برامج التتبّع المناسبة من Google وغيرها إمكانية الوصول إلى المحتوى. ويختلف هذا الأمر حسب الناشر.
*   احرص على أن تكون سياسة وصول برامج التتبّع إلى المحتوى هي نفسها للصفحات ذات التنسيق AMP والتنسيقات الأخرى، وإلّا قد يؤدي ذلك إلى ظهور أخطاء في Search Console بشأن عدم تطابق المحتوى.

الاعتبارات المتعلقة بالذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي في &quot;بحث Google&quot;
------------------------------------------------------------------------

توفّر &quot;النبذات باستخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي&quot; و&quot;وضع AI&quot; نبذة حول موضوع محدّد أو طلب بحث معيّن استنادًا إلى مجموعة متنوعة من المصادر، بما في ذلك المصادر على الويب. وبالتالي، تخضع هذه الملخّصات [لطُرق التحكّم في المعاينات](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/snippet?hl=ar#nosnippet)
 على &quot;بحث Google&quot;.

تأكَّد من أنّ محرّك بحث Google يمكنه الزحف إلى صفحاتك وفهرستها
--------------------------------------------------------------

إذا أردت أن يزحف محرّك بحث Google إلى المحتوى الخاص بك ويفهرسه، بما في ذلك الأقسام المحمية بنظام حظر الاشتراك غير المدفوع، تأكّد من إمكانية وصول [Googlebot](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/verifying-googlebot?hl=ar)
 إلى صفحتك، ومن وصول [`Googlebot-News`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/overview-google-crawlers?hl=ar#googlebot-news)
 إليها أيضًا إذا كان ذلك مناسبًا للمحتوى.

استخدِم [أداة فحص عنوان URL](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=ar)
 لاختبار إمكانية زحف محرّك بحث Google إلى عنوان URL وكيفية عرضه على موقعك.

التحكم في المعلومات التي يتم عرضها في نتائج البحث
-------------------------------------------------

إذا أردت استبعاد أقسام معيّنة من المحتوى في مقتطفات نتائج البحث، استخدِم [سمة HTML‏ `data-nosnippet`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/robots-meta-tag?hl=ar#data-nosnippet-attr)
. يمكنك أيضًا تحديد عدد الأحرف التي يمكن أن يحتوي عليها مقتطف نتيجة البحث باستخدام [العلامة `max-snippet` robots `meta`](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/robots-meta-tag?hl=ar#max-snippet)
.

تحديد المشاكل وحلّها
--------------------

إذا كنت تواجه مشكلة في تطبيق البيانات المنظَّمة أو تصحيح الأخطاء فيها، إليك بعض المراجع التي قد تساعدك.

*   إذا كنت تستخدم نظام إدارة محتوى (CMS) أو تستعين بشخص لإدارة موقعك الإلكتروني، اطلب المساعدة من هذه الجهات. واحرص على إعادة توجيه أي رسائل في Search Console توضّح المشكلة.
*   لا يضمن محرك بحث Google ظهور الميزات التي تستخدم البيانات المنظَّمة ضمن نتائج البحث. للاطّلاع على قائمة بالأسباب الشائعة التي قد تؤدي إلى عدم عرض المحتوى في نتيجة غنية بصريًا على &quot;بحث Google&quot;، يمكنك مراجعة [الإرشادات العامة للبيانات المنظَّمة](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/sd-policies?hl=ar)
    .
*   قد يكون هناك خطأ في بياناتك المنظَّمة. اطّلِع على [قائمة أخطاء البيانات المنظَّمة](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=ar#error_list)
     و[تقرير البيانات المنظَّمة غير القابلة للتحليل](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9166415?hl=ar)
    .
*   إذا تم اتخاذ إجراء يدوي بحق البيانات المنظَّمة على صفحتك، سيتم تجاهُل البيانات المنظَّمة المتاحة على الصفحة (مع إمكانية استمرار ظهور الصفحة في نتائج البحث من Google). لحلّ [المشاكل المتعلقة بالبيانات المنظّمة](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9044175?hl=ar#zippy=,structured-data-issue)
    ، استخدِم [تقرير &quot;الإجراءات اليدوية&quot;](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9044175?hl=ar)
    .
*   راجِع [الإرشادات](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/paywalled-content?hl=ar#guidelines)
     مرة أخرى لتحديد ما إذا كان المحتوى الخاص بك غير متوافق مع الإرشادات. قد يكون السبب في المشكلة هو تضمين محتوى غير مرغوب فيه أو استخدام ترميز غير مرغوب فيه. وقد لا تكون المشكلة مرتبطة بالبنية، ما قد يؤدي إلى عدم إمكانية تحديد هذه المشاكل من خلال &quot;اختبار النتائج الغنية بصريًا&quot;.
*   حاوِل [تحديد وحل مشكلة عدم ظهور بعض النتائج الغنية بصريًا/الانخفاض في إجمالي النتائج الغنية بصريًا](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=ar#missing-jobs)
    .
*   تحتاج عملية إعادة الزحف والفهرسة إلى بعض الوقت. وتذكَّر أنّ محرّك بحث Google قد يستغرق عدّة أيام من تاريخ نشر الصفحة للعثور عليها والزحف إليها. للاطّلاع على الأسئلة العامة حول الزحف والفهرسة، يمكنك مراجعة [الأسئلة الشائعة حول الزحف والفهرسة في &quot;بحث Google‏&quot;](https://developers.google.com/search/help/crawling-index-faq?hl=ar)
    .
*   يمكنك نشر أي سؤال في [منتدى &quot;مجموعة خدمات بحث Google&quot;](https://support.google.com/webmasters/community?hl=ar)
    .

إرسال ملاحظات

إنّ محتوى هذه الصفحة مرخّص بموجب [ترخيص Creative Commons Attribution 4.0‏](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
 ما لم يُنصّ على خلاف ذلك، ونماذج الرموز مرخّصة بموجب [ترخيص Apache 2.0‏](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
. للاطّلاع على التفاصيل، يُرجى مراجعة [سياسات موقع Google Developers‏](https://developers.google.com/site-policies?hl=ar)
. إنّ Java هي علامة تجارية مسجَّلة لشركة Oracle و/أو شركائها التابعين.

تاريخ التعديل الأخير: 2025-09-03 (حسب التوقيت العالمي المتفَّق عليه)

---

# Markup Skema Halaman Profil (ProfilePage) | Pusat Google Penelusuran  |  Documentation  |  Google for Developers

[Langsung ke konten utama](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#main-content)

[![Google Search Central](https://developers.google.com/static/search/images/google-search-central-logo.svg)](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=id)

*   [Google Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=id)
    

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   Türkçe
*   Русский
*   العربيّة
*   हिंदी
*   ภาษาไทย
*   中文 – 简体
*   中文 – 繁體
*   日本語
*   한국어

Masuk

*   [Documentation](https://developers.google.com/search/docs?hl=id)
    

[Search Console](https://goo.gle/searchconsole)

*   [Beranda](https://developers.google.com/?hl=id)
    
*   [Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search?hl=id)
    
*   [Documentation](https://developers.google.com/search/docs?hl=id)
    

Kirim masukan

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.

Data terstruktur halaman profil (`ProfilePage`)
===============================================

![Ilustrasi fitur diskusi dan forum](https://developers.google.com/static/search/docs/images/discussions-and-forums-rich-result.png?hl=id)

Markup `ProfilePage` dirancang untuk situs mana pun tempat kreator (baik orang maupun organisasi) berbagi perspektif langsung. Penggunaan markup ini akan membantu Google Penelusuran memahami kreator yang memposting konten di komunitas online. Tindakan ini juga memungkinkan Google menampilkan konten yang lebih baik dari komunitas tersebut di hasil penelusuran, termasuk fitur [Diskusi dan Forum](https://blog.google/products/search/google-search-discussions-forums-news/?hl=id)
.

Fitur data terstruktur lainnya juga dapat ditautkan ke halaman yang memuat markup `ProfilePage`. Misalnya, data terstruktur [Artikel](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/article?hl=id)
 dan [Resep](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/recipe?hl=id)
 memiliki penulis, dan sering kali ada beberapa penulis yang disertakan dalam data terstruktur [forum diskusi](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/discussion-forum?hl=id)
 dan [halaman Tanya Jawab](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/qapage?hl=id)
.

Cara menambahkan data terstruktur
---------------------------------

Data terstruktur adalah format terstandarisasi untuk memberikan informasi tentang suatu halaman dan mengelompokkan konten halaman tersebut. Jika Anda baru mengenal data terstruktur, Anda dapat mempelajari lebih lanjut [cara kerja data terstruktur](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data?hl=id)
.

Berikut adalah ringkasan tentang cara membuat, menguji, dan merilis data terstruktur.

1.  Tambahkan [properti wajib](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#structured-data-type-definitions)
    . Berdasarkan format yang Anda gunakan, pelajari tempat [menyisipkan data terstruktur di halaman](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data?hl=id#format-placement)
    .
2.  Ikuti [pedoman](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#guidelines)
    .
3.  Validasi kode Anda menggunakan [Pengujian Hasil Kaya](https://search.google.com/test/rich-results?hl=id)
     dan perbaiki setiap error kritis. Pertimbangkan juga untuk memperbaiki masalah non-kritis yang mungkin ditandai di alat tersebut, karena tindakan ini dapat membantu meningkatkan kualitas data terstruktur Anda (tetapi hal ini tidak diperlukan agar memenuhi syarat untuk hasil kaya).
4.  Deploy beberapa halaman yang menyertakan data terstruktur dan gunakan [Alat Inspeksi URL](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=id)
     untuk menguji cara Google melihat halaman tersebut. Pastikan halaman Anda dapat diakses oleh Google dan tidak diblokir oleh file robots.txt, tag `noindex`, atau persyaratan login. Jika halaman tidak bermasalah, Anda dapat [meminta Google meng-crawl ulang URL tersebut](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/ask-google-to-recrawl?hl=id)
    .
5.  Agar Google tetap mengetahui setiap perubahan pada masa mendatang, sebaiknya [kirimkan peta situs](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/sitemaps/build-sitemap?hl=id)
    . Anda dapat mengotomatiskan proses ini dengan [Search Console Sitemap API](https://developers.google.com/webmaster-tools/v1/sitemaps?hl=id)
    .

Contoh
------

Berikut contoh halaman profil dengan markup:

<html> <head> <title>Angelo Huff on Cool Forum Platform</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "ProfilePage", "dateCreated": "2024-12-23T12:34:00-05:00", "dateModified": "2024-12-26T14:53:00-05:00", "mainEntity": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Angelo Huff", "alternateName": "ahuff23", "identifier": "123475623", "interactionStatistic": \[{ "@type": "InteractionCounter", "interactionType": "https://schema.org/FollowAction", "userInteractionCount": 1 },{ "@type": "InteractionCounter", "interactionType": "https://schema.org/LikeAction", "userInteractionCount": 5 }\], "agentInteractionStatistic": { "@type": "InteractionCounter", "interactionType": "https://schema.org/WriteAction", "userInteractionCount": 2346 }, "description": "Defender of Truth", "image": "https://example.com/avatars/ahuff23.jpg", "sameAs": \[ "https://www.example.com/real-angelo", "https://example.com/profile/therealangelohuff" \] } } </script> </head> <body> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
    <title>Angelo Huff on Cool Forum Platform</title>
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "ProfilePage",
      "dateCreated": "2024-12-23T12:34:00-05:00",
      "dateModified": "2024-12-26T14:53:00-05:00",
      "mainEntity": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Angelo Huff",
        "alternateName": "ahuff23",
        "identifier": "123475623",
        "interactionStatistic": \[{\
          "@type": "InteractionCounter",\
          "interactionType": "https://schema.org/FollowAction",\
          "userInteractionCount": 1\
        },{\
          "@type": "InteractionCounter",\
          "interactionType": "https://schema.org/LikeAction",\
          "userInteractionCount": 5\
        }\],
        "agentInteractionStatistic": {
          "@type": "InteractionCounter",
          "interactionType": "https://schema.org/WriteAction",
          "userInteractionCount": 2346
        },
        "description": "Defender of Truth",
        "image": "https://example.com/avatars/ahuff23.jpg",
        "sameAs": \[\
          "https://www.example.com/real-angelo",\
          "https://example.com/profile/therealangelohuff"\
        \]
      }
    }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
  </body>
</html>

<html> <head> <title>Angelo Huff on Cool Forum Platform</title> </head> <body itemtype="https://schema.org/ProfilePage" itemscope> <meta itemprop="dateCreated" content="2024-12-23T12:34:00-05:00" /> <meta itemprop="dateModified" content="2024-12-26T14:53:00-05:00" /> <div itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope> <div><span itemprop="alternateName" id="handle">ahuff23</span> (<span itemprop="name" id="real-name">Angelo Huff</span>)</div> <meta itemprop="identifier" content="123475623" /> <div itemprop="description">Defender of Truth</div> <img itemprop="image" src="https://example.com/avatars/ahuff23.jpg" /> <div>Links: <a itemprop="sameAs" href="https://www.therealangelohuff.com">Home Page</a><br> <a itemprop="sameAs" href="https://example.com/profile/therealangelohuff">Other Social Media Site</a></div> <div><span itemprop="interactionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope> <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">5</span> <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/LikeAction">likes</span> </span>, <span itemprop="interactionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope> <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">1</span> <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/FollowAction">follower</span> </span>, and <span itemprop="agentInteractionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope> <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">2346</span> <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/WriteAction">posts</span> </span> </div> </div> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
    <title>Angelo Huff on Cool Forum Platform</title>
  </head>
  <body itemtype="https://schema.org/ProfilePage" itemscope>
    <meta itemprop="dateCreated" content="2024-12-23T12:34:00-05:00" />
  	<meta itemprop="dateModified" content="2024-12-26T14:53:00-05:00" />
    <div itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope>
      <div><span itemprop="alternateName" id="handle">ahuff23</span> (<span itemprop="name" id="real-name">Angelo Huff</span>)</div>
      <meta itemprop="identifier" content="123475623" />
      <div itemprop="description">Defender of Truth</div>
      <img itemprop="image" src="https://example.com/avatars/ahuff23.jpg" />
      <div>Links: <a itemprop="sameAs" href="https://www.therealangelohuff.com">Home Page</a><br>
                  <a itemprop="sameAs" href="https://example.com/profile/therealangelohuff">Other Social Media Site</a></div>
      <div><span itemprop="interactionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope>
              <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">5</span>
              <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/LikeAction">likes</span>
           </span>,
           <span itemprop="interactionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope>
              <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">1</span>
              <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/FollowAction">follower</span>
           </span>, and
           <span itemprop="agentInteractionStatistic" itemtype="https://schema.org/InteractionCounter" itemscope>
              <span itemprop="userInteractionCount">2346</span>
              <span itemprop="interactionType" content="https://schema.org/WriteAction">posts</span>
           </span>
       </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

Panduan
-------

Agar data terstruktur halaman profil Anda memenuhi syarat untuk digunakan di Google Penelusuran, Anda harus mengikuti pedoman berikut:

*   [Panduan umum terkait data terstruktur](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/sd-policies?hl=id)
    
*   [Dasar-Dasar Penelusuran](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/essentials?hl=id)
    
*   [Pedoman Konten](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#content-guidelines)
    
*   [Pedoman Teknis](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#technical-guidelines)
    

### Pedoman konten

*   Fokus utama halaman harus pada satu orang atau organisasi yang berafiliasi dengan keseluruhan situs. Berikut beberapa contoh halaman profil:  
    
    Kasus penggunaan yang valid:
    
    *   Halaman profil pengguna di forum atau situs media sosial
    *   Halaman penulis di situs berita
    *   Halaman "Tentang Saya" di situs blog
    *   Halaman karyawan di situs perusahaan
    
    Kasus penggunaan yang tidak valid:
    
    *   Halaman beranda utama toko (biasanya berisi banyak info non-profil)
    *   Situs ulasan organisasi (organisasi tidak terkait dengan situs)

### Panduan teknis

Jika halaman profil juga menyertakan aktivitas terbaru dari kreator, Anda dapat menyertakan markup menggunakan URL pada objek tersebut untuk merujuk halaman dengan markup dan konten lengkap. Misalnya, berikut salah satu contoh struktur markup:

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "ProfilePage",
  "mainEntity": {
    "@id": "#main-author",
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marlo Smith"
  },
  "hasPart": \[{\
    "@type": "Article",\
    "headline": "Things to see in NJ",\
    "url": "https://example.com/things-to-see-nj",\
    "datePublished": "2014-02-23T18:34:00Z",\
    "author": { "@id": "#main-author" }\
  }\]
}

Definisi jenis data terstruktur
-------------------------------

Anda harus menyertakan properti wajib agar data terstruktur tersebut memenuhi syarat untuk ditampilkan dalam hasil penelusuran. Anda juga dapat menyertakan properti yang direkomendasikan untuk menambahkan informasi lain tentang halaman profil, yang akan meningkatkan kualitas pengalaman pengguna.

### `ProfilePage`

Definisi lengkap `ProfilePage` tersedia di [schema.org/ProfilePage](https://schema.org/ProfilePage)
.

| Properti wajib |     |
| --- | --- |
| `mainEntity` | `[Person](https://schema.org/Person) ` atau `[Organization](https://schema.org/Organization) `<br><br>Orang atau organisasi yang dijelaskan di halaman profil ini. Hal ini menunjukkan bahwa fokus utama halaman ini adalah informasi tentang entitas ini.<br><br>Coba gunakan jenis yang benar jika informasi tersebut tersedia (artinya, jika Anda tahu apakah halaman merepresentasikan orang atau organisasi); jika tidak, setelan defaultnya yaitu `Person` (misalnya, jika jenis akun tidak dikenal). |

| Properti yang direkomendasikan |     |
| --- | --- |
| `dateCreated` | `[DateTime](https://schema.org/DateTime) `<br><br>Tanggal dan waktu saat profil dibuat, jika ada, dalam format tanggal [ISO 8601](https://wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)<br>. |
| `dateModified` | `[DateTime](https://schema.org/DateTime) `<br><br>Tanggal dan waktu saat informasi pada profil tersebut diubah, jika ada, dalam format tanggal [ISO 8601](https://wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)<br>. Idealnya, ini hanya mewakili perubahan metadata yang diedit manusia pada profil (misalnya, menambahkan outlink tambahan ke tempat yang merujuk profil ini tidak dianggap sebagai perubahan). |

### `Person` atau `Organization`

Baik [schema.org/Person](https://schema.org/Person)
 dan [schema.org/Organization](https://schema.org/Organization)
 memiliki properti yang sama yang digunakan oleh Google.

| Properti wajib |     |
| --- | --- |
| `name` | `[Text](https://schema.org/Text) `<br><br>Cara utama orang atau organisasi diidentifikasi. Sebaiknya gunakan kolom ini untuk nama asli (dan `alternateName` untuk nama akun media sosial). Namun, Anda dapat menggunakan kolom ini untuk menentukan nama akun media sosial jika itu adalah satu-satunya cara orang tersebut dapat diidentifikasi di situs Anda. |

| Properti yang direkomendasikan |     |
| --- | --- |
| `agentInteractionStatistic` | `[InteractionCounter](https://schema.org/InteractionCounter) `<br><br>Statistik pengguna tentang perilaku entitas halaman profil, jika ada.<br><br>Google mengenali `interactionTypes` berikut:<br><br>*   [https://schema.org/FollowAction](https://schema.org/FollowAction)<br>    : Jumlah akun lain yang diikuti.<br>*   [https://schema.org/LikeAction](https://schema.org/LikeAction)<br>    : Jumlah suka (umumnya dari postingan entitas lain).<br>*   [https://schema.org/WriteAction](https://schema.org/WriteAction)<br>    : Jumlah postingan.<br>*   [https://schema.org/ShareAction](https://schema.org/ShareAction)<br>    : Jumlah postingan yang dibagikan ulang. |
| `alternateName` | `[Text](https://schema.org/Text) `<br><br>ID publik alternatif, jika ada. Misalnya, nama akun media sosial jika nama asli seseorang digunakan di kolom `name`. |
| `description` | `[Text](https://schema.org/Text) `<br><br>Kredensial yang berlaku atau baris nama pengguna, jika ada. |
| `identifier` | `[Text](https://schema.org/Text) `<br><br>ID unik apa pun yang digunakan dalam situs Anda, jika ada. ID ini dapat berupa ID database internal yang digunakan situs Anda untuk mengidentifikasi pengguna meskipun jika akun media sosialnya berubah. |
| `image` | `[URL](https://schema.org/URL) ` atau `[ImageObject](https://schema.org/ImageObject) `<br><br>URL atau `ImageObject` gambar profil kreator, jika ada. Jika tidak ada gambar, jangan sertakan gambar, ikon, atau gambar placeholder default di kolom ini.<br><br>Panduan gambar tambahan:<br><br>*   URL gambar harus dapat di-crawl dan diindeks. Untuk memeriksa apakah Google dapat mengakses URL Anda, gunakan [Alat Inspeksi URL](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=id)<br>    .<br>*   Gambar harus mewakili konten yang di-markup.<br>*   Gambar harus dalam format file yang [didukung oleh Google Gambar](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/google-images?hl=id#supported-image-formats)<br>    .<br>*   Untuk hasil terbaik, sebaiknya sediakan beberapa gambar beresolusi tinggi (minimal 50 ribu piksel saat mengalikan lebar dan tinggi) dengan rasio aspek berikut: 16x9, 4x3, dan 1x1.<br><br>Contoh:<br><br>"image": \[<br>  "https://example.com/photos/1x1/photo.jpg",<br>  "https://example.com/photos/4x3/photo.jpg",<br>  "https://example.com/photos/16x9/photo.jpg"<br>\] |
| `interactionStatistic` | `[InteractionCounter](https://schema.org/InteractionCounter) `<br><br>Statistik pengguna diterapkan ke entitas halaman profil, jika ada. Hanya sertakan statistik tentang platform tempat halaman profil dihosting (jangan merujuk bahwa kreator juga memiliki 100.000 pengikut di halaman berandanya).<br><br>Google mengenali `interactionTypes` berikut:<br><br>*   [https://schema.org/FollowAction](https://schema.org/FollowAction)<br>    : Jumlah pengikut.<br>*   [https://schema.org/LikeAction](https://schema.org/LikeAction)<br>    : Jumlah suka untuk entitas ini.<br>*   [https://schema.org/BefriendAction](https://schema.org/BefriendAction)<br>    : Hubungan dua arah. |
| `sameAs` | `[URL](https://schema.org/URL) `<br><br>URL ke profil eksternal atau halaman beranda untuk profil, jika ada. |

Memantau hasil kaya dengan Search Console
-----------------------------------------

Search Console adalah alat yang dapat membantu Anda memantau performa halaman Anda di Google Penelusuran. Anda tidak perlu mendaftar ke Search Console agar halaman Anda dapat disertakan dalam hasil Google Penelusuran. Tetapi dengan mendaftar, Anda dapat memahami dan meningkatkan cara Google melihat situs Anda dengan mudah. Sebaiknya Anda memeriksa Search Console dalam kasus berikut:

1.  [Setelah men-deploy data terstruktur untuk pertama kalinya](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#after-deploying)
    
2.  [Setelah merilis template baru atau memperbarui kode](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#after-releasing)
    
3.  [Menganalisis traffic secara berkala](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#analyzing-periodically)
    

### Setelah men-deploy data terstruktur untuk pertama kalinya

Setelah Google mengindeks halaman Anda, temukan masalah menggunakan [laporan status Hasil kaya](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=id)
 yang relevan. Idealnya, akan ada peningkatan jumlah item yang valid, sedangkan jumlah item yang tidak valid tidak berubah. Jika Anda menemukan masalah pada data terstruktur Anda:

1.  [Perbaiki item yang tidak valid](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#troubleshooting)
    .
2.  [Periksa URL aktif](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=id#test_live_page)
     untuk memeriksa apakah masalah terus berlanjut.
3.  [Minta validasi](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=id#validation)
     menggunakan laporan status.

### Setelah merilis template baru atau memperbarui kode Anda

Saat Anda membuat perubahan yang signifikan pada situs, pantau peningkatan jumlah item yang tidak valid pada data terstruktur.

*   Jika terjadi **peningkatan jumlah item yang tidak valid**, mungkin Anda meluncurkan template baru yang tidak berfungsi, atau situs Anda berinteraksi dengan template yang ada dengan cara baru yang salah.
*   Jika terjadi **penurunan jumlah item yang valid** (tidak cocok dengan peningkatan jumlah item yang tidak valid), mungkin Anda tidak lagi menyematkan data terstruktur di halaman Anda. Gunakan [Alat Inspeksi URL](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=id)
     untuk mempelajari penyebab masalah tersebut.

### Menganalisis traffic secara berkala

Analisis traffic Google Penelusuran Anda menggunakan [Laporan Performa](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7576553?hl=id)
. Data akan menunjukkan seberapa sering halaman Anda muncul sebagai hasil kaya di Penelusuran, seberapa sering pengguna mengkliknya, dan posisi rata-rata halaman Anda saat muncul di hasil penelusuran. Anda juga dapat otomatis menarik hasil ini dengan [Search Console API](https://developers.google.com/webmaster-tools/search-console-api-original/v3/how-tos/search_analytics?hl=id)
.

Pemecahan masalah
-----------------

Jika Anda mengalami masalah saat menerapkan atau mendebug data terstruktur, berikut beberapa referensi yang dapat membantu Anda.

*   Jika Anda menggunakan sistem pengelolaan konten (CMS) atau ada orang lain yang menangani situs Anda, minta mereka untuk membantu Anda. Pastikan untuk meneruskan pesan Search Console yang menjelaskan masalah tersebut kepada mereka.
*   Google tidak menjamin bahwa fitur yang menggunakan data terstruktur akan muncul dalam hasil penelusuran. Untuk mengetahui daftar alasan umum mengapa Google tidak dapat menampilkan konten Anda dalam hasil kaya, lihat [Panduan Umum terkait Data Terstruktur](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/sd-policies?hl=id)
    .
*   Anda mungkin mengalami error pada data terstruktur. Periksa [daftar error data terstruktur](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=id#error_list)
     dan [Laporan data terstruktur yang tidak dapat diurai](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9166415?hl=id)
    .
*   Jika halaman Anda dikenai tindakan manual data terstruktur, data terstruktur pada halaman itu akan diabaikan (meskipun halaman masih bisa muncul di hasil Google Penelusuran). Untuk memperbaiki [masalah data terstruktur](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9044175?hl=id#zippy=,structured-data-issue)
    , gunakan [laporan Tindakan Manual](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9044175?hl=id)
    .
*   Tinjau [pedoman](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/profile-page?hl=id#guidelines)
     lagi untuk mengidentifikasi apakah konten Anda tidak mematuhi pedoman. Masalah itu mungkin disebabkan oleh konten yang berisi spam atau penggunaan markup yang berisi spam. Namun, masalahnya mungkin bukan pada sintaksis, sehingga Pengujian Hasil Kaya tidak akan dapat mengidentifikasi masalah tersebut.
*   [Memecahkan masalah hasil kaya tidak ada/penurunan jumlah hasil kaya](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/7552505?hl=id#missing-jobs)
    .
*   Tunggu hingga crawling ulang dan pengindeksan ulang selesai. Perlu diingat bahwa Google mungkin memerlukan waktu beberapa hari untuk mencari dan meng-crawl halaman setelah Anda memublikasikannya. Untuk pertanyaan umum terkait crawling dan pengindeksan, lihat [FAQ crawling dan pengindeksan Google Penelusuran](https://developers.google.com/search/help/crawling-index-faq?hl=id)
    .
*   Posting pertanyaan di [forum Pusat Google Penelusuran](https://support.google.com/webmasters/community?hl=id)
    .

Kirim masukan

Kecuali dinyatakan lain, konten di halaman ini dilisensikan berdasarkan [Lisensi Creative Commons Attribution 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
, sedangkan contoh kode dilisensikan berdasarkan [Lisensi Apache 2.0](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
. Untuk mengetahui informasi selengkapnya, lihat [Kebijakan Situs Google Developers](https://developers.google.com/site-policies?hl=id)
. Java adalah merek dagang terdaftar dari Oracle dan/atau afiliasinya.

Terakhir diperbarui pada 2025-08-04 UTC.

Datos estructurados de fragmento de reseña (`Review`, `AggregateRating`)
========================================================================

Un fragmento de reseña es un extracto breve de una reseña o valoración de un sitio web de reseñas, que suele ser un promedio de las puntuaciones combinadas de muchos reseñadores. Cuando encontramos reseñas válidas o etiquetas de valoración, podemos mostrar un fragmento enriquecido que incluye estrellas y otra información resumida de las reseñas o valoraciones. Además del texto de la reseña, una valoración es una evaluación representada con una escala numérica (como de 1 a 5). Los fragmentos de reseña pueden aparecer en resultados enriquecidos o en paneles de información de Google. Puedes proporcionar reseñas de las siguientes funciones:

![Fragmento de reseña en la Búsqueda de Google](https://developers.google.com/static/search/docs/images/reviews04.png?hl=es)

*   [Libro](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/book?hl=es)
    
*   [Lista de cursos](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/course?hl=es)
    
*   [Evento](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/event?hl=es)
    
*   [Empresa local](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/local-business?hl=es)
     (solo para sitios que capturan reseñas sobre otras empresas locales; consulta las [directrices sobre reseñas interesadas](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/review-snippet?hl=es#self-serving)
    )
*   [Película](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/movie?hl=es)
    
*   [Producto](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/product?hl=es)
    
*   [Receta](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/recipe?hl=es)
    
*   [Aplicación de software](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/software-app?hl=es)
    

Google también admite reseñas de los siguientes tipos de schema.org (y de sus subtipos):

*   `[CreativeWorkSeason](https://schema.org/CreativeWorkSeason) `
*   `[CreativeWorkSeries](https://schema.org/CreativeWorkSeries) `
*   `[Episode](https://schema.org/Episode) `
*   `[Game](https://schema.org/Game) `
*   `[MediaObject](https://schema.org/MediaObject) `
*   `[MusicPlaylist](https://schema.org/MusicPlaylist) `
*   `[MusicRecording](https://schema.org/MusicRecording) `
*   `[Organization](https://schema.org/Organization) ` (solo para sitios que capturan reseñas sobre otras organizaciones; consulta las [directrices sobre reseñas interesadas](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/review-snippet?hl=es#self-serving)
    )

Cómo añadir datos estructurados
-------------------------------

Los datos estructurados son un formato estandarizado con el que se puede proporcionar información sobre una página y clasificar su contenido. Consulta [cómo funcionan los datos estructurados](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data?hl=es)
 si aún no te has familiarizado con ellos.

A continuación se explica a grandes rasgos cómo crear, probar y publicar datos estructurados.

1.  Añade las [propiedades obligatorias](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/review-snippet?hl=es#structured-data-type-definitions)
    . Consulta más información sobre dónde [insertar datos estructurados en una página](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data?hl=es#format-placement)
     en función del formato que estés utilizando.
2.  Sigue las [directrices](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/review-snippet?hl=es#guidelines)
    .
3.  Valida tu código con la [prueba de resultados enriquecidos](https://search.google.com/test/rich-results?hl=es)
     y corrige los errores críticos. Te recomendamos que también corrijas los problemas no críticos que puedan marcarse en la herramienta, ya que pueden ayudar a mejorar la calidad de los datos estructurados (sin embargo, esto no es necesario para que se muestren los resultados enriquecidos).
4.  Crea varias páginas que incluyan tus datos estructurados y comprueba cómo las ve Google con la [herramienta de inspección de URLs](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9012289?hl=es)
    . Asegúrate de que Google pueda acceder a tu página y de que no esté bloqueada por un archivo robots.txt, por la etiqueta `noindex` ni por requisitos de inicio de sesión. Si la página se ve bien, puedes [solicitar que Google vuelva a rastrear tus URLs](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/ask-google-to-recrawl?hl=es)
    .
5.  Para que Google siempre tenga la versión actualizada de tus páginas, te recomendamos que [envíes un sitemap](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/sitemaps/build-sitemap?hl=es)
    . Puedes automatizar este envío con la [API Sitemap de Search Console](https://developers.google.com/webmaster-tools/v1/sitemaps?hl=es)
    .

Ejemplos
--------

Hay varias formas de añadir datos estructurados `Review` a una página:

*   Añadir una reseña sencilla.
*   Anidar una reseña en otro tipo de schema.org con su propiedad [`review`](https://schema.org/review)
    .
*   Añadir puntuaciones totales. Puedes omitir la valoración de una reseña concreta si tu contenido con etiquetas contiene tanto un autor como una fecha de reseña. En el caso de las reseñas totales, debes proporcionar la valoración media para que se muestre el fragmento enriquecido.
*   Anidar puntuaciones totales en otro tipo de schema.org con su propiedad [`aggregateRating`](https://schema.org/aggregateRating)
    .

### Reseña sencilla

A continuación se muestra un ejemplo de una reseña sencilla.

### JSON-LD

<html> <head> <title>Legal Seafood</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org/", "@type": "Review", "itemReviewed": { "@type": "Restaurant", "image": "https://www.example.com/seafood-restaurant.jpg", "name": "Legal Seafood", "servesCuisine": "Seafood", "priceRange": "$$$", "telephone": "1234567", "address" :{ "@type": "PostalAddress", "streetAddress": "123 William St", "addressLocality": "New York", "addressRegion": "NY", "postalCode": "10038", "addressCountry": "US" } }, "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": 4 }, "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Bob Smith" }, "publisher": { "@type": "Organization", "name": "Washington Times" } } </script> </head> <body> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
  <title>Legal Seafood</title>
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org/",
      "@type": "Review",
      "itemReviewed": {
        "@type": "Restaurant",
        "image": "https://www.example.com/seafood-restaurant.jpg",
        "name": "Legal Seafood",
        "servesCuisine": "Seafood",
        "priceRange": "$$$",
        "telephone": "1234567",
        "address" :{
          "@type": "PostalAddress",
          "streetAddress": "123 William St",
          "addressLocality": "New York",
          "addressRegion": "NY",
          "postalCode": "10038",
          "addressCountry": "US"
        }
      },
      "reviewRating": {
        "@type": "Rating",
        "ratingValue": 4
      },
      "author": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Bob Smith"
      },
      "publisher": {
        "@type": "Organization",
        "name": "Washington Times"
      }
    }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
  </body>
</html>

### RDFa

 <html> <head> <title>Legal Seafood</title> </head> <body> <div vocab="https://schema.org/" typeof="Review"> <div property="itemReviewed" typeof="Restaurant"> <img property="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/seafood-restaurant.jpg" alt="Legal Seafood"/> <span property="name">Legal Seafood</span> <span property="servesCuisine">Seafood</span> <span property="priceRange">$$$</span> <span property="telephone">1234567</span> <span property="address">123 William St, New York</span> </div> <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating"> <span property="ratingValue">4</span> </span> stars - <b>"A good seafood place." </b> <span property="author" typeof="Person"> <span property="name">Bob Smith</span> </span> <div property="publisher" typeof="Organization"> <meta property="name" content="Washington Times"> </div> </div> </body> </html>

  

 <html>
  <head>
    <title>Legal Seafood</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div vocab="https://schema.org/" typeof="Review">
      <div property="itemReviewed" typeof="Restaurant">
        <img property="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/seafood-restaurant.jpg" alt="Legal Seafood"/>
        <span property="name">Legal Seafood</span>
        <span property="servesCuisine">Seafood</span>
        <span property="priceRange">$$$</span>
        <span property="telephone">1234567</span>
        <span property="address">123 William St, New York</span>
      </div>
      <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating">
        <span property="ratingValue">4</span>
      </span> stars -
      <b>"A good seafood place." </b>
      <span property="author" typeof="Person">
        <span property="name">Bob Smith</span>
      </span>
      <div property="publisher" typeof="Organization">
        <meta property="name" content="Washington Times">
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

### Microdatos

 <html> <head> <title>Legal Seafood</title> </head> <body> <div itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Review"> <div itemprop="itemReviewed" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Restaurant"> <img itemprop="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/seafood-restaurant.jpg" alt="Legal Seafood"/> <span itemprop="name">Legal Seafood</span> <span itemprop="servesCuisine">Seafood</span> <span itemprop="priceRange">$$$</span> <span itemprop="telephone">1234567</span> <span itemprop="address">123 William St, New York</span> </div> <span itemprop="reviewRating" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Rating"> <span itemprop="ratingValue">4</span> </span> stars - <b>"A good seafood place." </b> <span itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person"> <span itemprop="name">Bob Smith</span> </span> <div itemprop="publisher" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Organization"> <meta itemprop="name" content="Washington Times"> </div> </div> </body> </html>

  

 <html>
  <head>
  <title>Legal Seafood</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Review">
      <div itemprop="itemReviewed" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Restaurant">
        <img itemprop="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/seafood-restaurant.jpg" alt="Legal Seafood"/>
        <span itemprop="name">Legal Seafood</span>
        <span itemprop="servesCuisine">Seafood</span>
        <span itemprop="priceRange">$$$</span>
        <span itemprop="telephone">1234567</span>
        <span itemprop="address">123 William St, New York</span>
      </div>
      <span itemprop="reviewRating" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Rating">
        <span itemprop="ratingValue">4</span>
      </span> stars -
      <b>"A good seafood place." </b>
      <span itemprop="author" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">
        <span itemprop="name">Bob Smith</span>
      </span>
      <div itemprop="publisher" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Organization">
        <meta itemprop="name" content="Washington Times">
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

### Reseña anidada

A continuación, se muestra un ejemplo de una reseña anidada en un objeto `Product`. Puedes copiar y pegar el ejemplo en tu propia página HTML.

### JSON-LD

<html> <head> <title>The Catcher in the Rye</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org/", "@type": "Product", "brand": { "@type": "Brand", "name": "Penguin Books" }, "description": "The Catcher in the Rye is a classic coming-of-age story: an story of teenage alienation, capturing the human need for connection and the bewildering sense of loss as we leave childhood behind.", "sku": "9780241984758", "mpn": "925872", "image": "https://www.example.com/catcher-in-the-rye-book-cover.jpg", "name": "The Catcher in the Rye", "review": \[{ "@type": "Review", "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": 5 }, "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "John Doe" } }, { "@type": "Review", "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": 1 }, "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Jane Doe" } }\], "aggregateRating": { "@type": "AggregateRating", "ratingValue": 88, "bestRating": 100, "ratingCount": 20 }, "offers": { "@type": "Offer", "url": "https://example.com/offers/catcher-in-the-rye", "priceCurrency": "USD", "price": 5.99, "priceValidUntil": "2024-11-05", "itemCondition": "https://schema.org/UsedCondition", "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock", "seller": { "@type": "Organization", "name": "eBay" } } } </script> </head> <body> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
    <title>The Catcher in the Rye</title>
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org/",
      "@type": "Product",
      "brand": {
        "@type": "Brand",
        "name": "Penguin Books"
      },
      "description": "The Catcher in the Rye is a classic coming-of-age story: an story of teenage alienation, capturing the human need for connection and the bewildering sense of loss as we leave childhood behind.",
      "sku": "9780241984758",
      "mpn": "925872",
      "image": "https://www.example.com/catcher-in-the-rye-book-cover.jpg",
      "name": "The Catcher in the Rye",
      "review": \[{\
        "@type": "Review",\
        "reviewRating": {\
          "@type": "Rating",\
          "ratingValue": 5\
        },\
        "author": {\
          "@type": "Person",\
          "name": "John Doe"\
        }\
       },\
      {\
        "@type": "Review",\
        "reviewRating": {\
          "@type": "Rating",\
          "ratingValue": 1\
        },\
        "author": {\
          "@type": "Person",\
          "name": "Jane Doe"\
        }\
      }\],
      "aggregateRating": {
        "@type": "AggregateRating",
        "ratingValue": 88,
        "bestRating": 100,
        "ratingCount": 20
      },
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "url": "https://example.com/offers/catcher-in-the-rye",
        "priceCurrency": "USD",
        "price": 5.99,
        "priceValidUntil": "2024-11-05",
        "itemCondition": "https://schema.org/UsedCondition",
        "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock",
        "seller": {
          "@type": "Organization",
          "name": "eBay"
        }
      }
    }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
  </body>
</html>

### RDFa

 <html> <head> <title>The Catcher in the Rye</title> </head> <body> <div vocab="https://schema.org/" typeof="Product"> <div rel="schema:brand"> <div typeof="schema:Brand"> <div property="schema:name" content="Penguin"></div> </div> </div> <div property="schema:description" content="The Catcher in the Rye is a classic coming-of-age story: an story of teenage alienation, capturing the human need for connection and the bewildering sense of loss as we leave childhood behind."></div> <div property="schema:sku" content="9780241984758"></div> <div property="schema:mpn" content="925872"></div> <img property="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/catcher-in-the-rye-book-cover.jpg" alt="Catcher in the Rye"/> <span property="name">The Catcher in the Rye</span> <div property="review" typeof="Review"> Reviews: <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating"> <span property="ratingValue">5</span> - </span> <b>"A masterpiece of literature" </b> by <span property="author" typeof="Person"> <span property="name">John Doe</span></span>, written on <meta property="datePublished" content="2006-05-04">4 May 2006 <div>I really enjoyed this book. It captures the essential challenge people face as they try make sense of their lives and grow to adulthood.</div> <span property="publisher" typeof="Organization"> <meta property="name" content="Washington Times"> </span> </div><div property="review" typeof="Review"> <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating"> <span property="ratingValue">1</span> - </span> <b>"The worst thing I've ever read" </b> by <span property="author" typeof="Person"> <span property="name">Jane Doe</span></span>, written on <meta property="datePublished" content="2006-05-10">10 May 2006 <span property="publisher" typeof="Organization"> <meta property="name" content="Washington Times"> </span> </div> <div rel="schema:aggregateRating"> <div typeof="schema:AggregateRating"> <div property="schema:reviewCount" content="89"></div> <div property="schema:ratingValue" content="4.4">4,4</div> stars </div> </div> <div rel="schema:offers"> <div typeof="schema:Offer"> <div property="schema:price" content="4.99"></div> <div property="schema:availability" content="https://schema.org/InStock"></div> <div property="schema:priceCurrency" content="GBP"></div> <div property="schema:priceValidUntil" datatype="xsd:date" content="2024-11-21"></div> <div rel="schema:url" resource="https://example.com/catcher"></div> <div property="schema:itemCondition" content="https://schema.org/UsedCondition"></div> </div> </div> </div> </body> </html>

  

 <html>
  <head>
    <title>The Catcher in the Rye</title>
  </head>
    <body>
      <div vocab="https://schema.org/" typeof="Product">
        <div rel="schema:brand">
          <div typeof="schema:Brand">
            <div property="schema:name" content="Penguin"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div property="schema:description" content="The Catcher in the Rye is a classic coming-of-age story: an story of teenage alienation, capturing the human need for connection and the bewildering sense of loss as we leave childhood behind."></div>
        <div property="schema:sku" content="9780241984758"></div>
        <div property="schema:mpn" content="925872"></div>
        <img property="image" src="https://example.com/photos/1x1/catcher-in-the-rye-book-cover.jpg" alt="Catcher in the Rye"/>
        <span property="name">The Catcher in the Rye</span>
        <div property="review" typeof="Review"> Reviews:
          <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating">
            <span property="ratingValue">5</span> -
          </span>
          <b>"A masterpiece of literature" </b> by
          <span property="author" typeof="Person">
            <span property="name">John Doe</span></span>, written on
          <meta property="datePublished" content="2006-05-04">4 May 2006
          <div>I really enjoyed this book. It captures the essential challenge people face as they try make sense of their lives and grow to adulthood.</div>
          <span property="publisher" typeof="Organization">
            <meta property="name" content="Washington Times">
          </span>
        </div><div property="review" typeof="Review">
          <span property="reviewRating" typeof="Rating">
            <span property="ratingValue">1</span> -
          </span>
          <b>"The worst thing I've ever read" </b> by
          <span property="author" typeof="Person">
            <span property="name">Jane Doe</span></span>, written on
          <meta property="datePublished" content="2006-05-10">10 May 2006
          <span property="publisher" typeof="Organization">
            <meta property="name" content="Washington Times">
          </span>
        </div>
        <div rel="schema:aggregateRating">
          <div typeof="schema:AggregateRating">
            <div property="schema:reviewCount" content="89"></div>
            <div property="schema:ratingValue" content="4.4">4,4</div> stars
          </div>
        </div>
        <div rel="schema:offers">
          <div typeof="schema:Offer">
            <div property="schema:price" content="4.99"></div>
            <div property="schema:availability" content="https://schema.org/InStock"></div>
            <div property="schema:priceCurrency" content="GBP"></div>
            <div property="schema:priceValidUntil" datatype="xsd:date" content="2024-11-21"></div>
            <div rel="schema:url" resource="https://example.com/catcher"></div>
            <div property="schema:itemCondition" content="https://schema.org/UsedCondition"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

### Puntuación total

A continuación se muestra un ejemplo de puntuación total.

### JSON-LD

<html> <head> <title>Legal Seafood</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org/", "@type": "AggregateRating", "itemReviewed": { "@type": "Restaurant", "image": "https://www.example.com/seafood-restaurant.jpg", "name": "Legal Seafood", "servesCuisine": "Seafood", "telephone": "1234567", "address" : { "@type": "PostalAddress", "streetAddress": "123 William St", "addressLocality": "New York", "addressRegion": "NY", "postalCode": "10038", "addressCountry": "US" } }, "ratingValue": 88, "bestRating": 100, "ratingCount": 20 } </script> </head> <body> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
    <title>Legal Seafood</title>
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org/",
      "@type": "AggregateRating",
      "itemReviewed": {
        "@type": "Restaurant",
        "image": "https://www.example.com/seafood-restaurant.jpg",
        "name": "Legal Seafood",
        "servesCuisine": "Seafood",
        "telephone": "1234567",
        "address" : {
          "@type": "PostalAddress",
          "streetAddress": "123 William St",
          "addressLocality": "New York",
          "addressRegion": "NY",
          "postalCode": "10038",
          "addressCountry": "US"
        }
      },
      "ratingValue": 88,
      "bestRating": 100,
      "ratingCount": 20
    }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body>
  </body>
</html>

### Puntuación total anidada

A continuación, se muestra un ejemplo de una puntuación total anidada en un objeto `Product`. Puedes copiar y pegar el ejemplo en tu propia página HTML.

### JSON-LD

<html> <head> <title>Executive Anvil</title> <script type="application/ld+json"> { "@context": "https://schema.org/", "@type": "Product", "name": "Executive Anvil", "image": \[ "https://example.com/photos/1x1/photo.jpg", "https://example.com/photos/4x3/photo.jpg", "https://example.com/photos/16x9/photo.jpg" \], "brand": { "@type": "Brand", "name": "ACME" }, "aggregateRating": { "@type": "AggregateRating", "ratingValue": 4.4, "ratingCount": 89 }, "offers": { "@type": "AggregateOffer", "lowPrice": 119.99, "highPrice": 199.99, "priceCurrency": "USD" } } </script> </head> <body> </body> </html>

  

<html>
  <head>
  <title>Executive Anvil</title>
  <script type="application/ld+json">
  {
    "@context": "https://schema.org/",
    "@type": "Product",
    "name": "Executive Anvil",
    "image": \[\
      "https://example.com/photos/1x1/photo.jpg",\
      "https://example.com/photos/4x3/photo.jpg",\
      "https://example.com/photos/16x9/photo.jpg"\
     \],
    "brand": {
      "@type": "Brand",
      "name": "ACME"
    },
    "aggregateRating": {
      "@type": "AggregateRating",
      "ratingValue": 4.4,
      "ratingCount": 89
    },
    "offers": {
      "@type": "AggregateOffer",
      "lowPrice": 119.99,
      "highPrice": 199.99,
      "priceCurrency": "USD"
    }
  }
  </script>
  </head>
  <body>
  </body>
</html>
